column1: # Fast Track Artists — live-shows/fast_track.tsv
# PURPOSE: Pre-authorized buy list for artists with no DC show history (or no headlining
# history) where a local show should be treated as an immediate buy without going through
# the potential list evaluation cycle.
# DISCIPLINE: This file is ONLY for artists who would NOT already be caught as a strong
# buy based on show history. If an artist has been seen multiple times or has a strong
# prior history (Kingfish, Larkin Poe, The Lone Bellow, ZZ Ward, etc.), they do NOT
# belong here — they are handled automatically by the existing tier system.
# CAP DEFAULTS (apply when column is blank):
#   Price Cap:    $100 all-in
#   Distance Cap: Regional (DC/MD/VA + Baltimore, ~60mi radius from Arlington)
#   Venue Cap:    Mid (Small venues + 9:30 Club, Wolf Trap Barns, State Theatre, Rams Head Live)
# VENUE CAP VALUES:
#   Small  = Birchmere, Hamilton Live, Rams Head On Stage, Hub City Vinyl, Jammin' Java,
#             Collective Encore, Union Stage, Wolf Trap Barns (acoustic room)
#   Mid    = Small + 9:30 Club, State Theatre, Rams Head Live, other ~500-1200 cap rooms
#   Large  = Mid + Wolf Trap Filene Center, The Anthem, similar 2000+ cap rooms
# DISTANCE CAP VALUES:
#   Local    = DC/MD/VA, Annapolis — regular driving range
#   Regional = Local + Baltimore, up to ~60 miles from Arlington
#   Extended = Regional + up to ~90 miles (requires strong pull)
# When a cap is exceeded, surface as a normal Choose recommendation in live_shows_potential
# rather than a Fast Track buy. All three caps must be satisfied for Fast Track treatment.
# BOOK CHECK: Pre-filled from autograph_books_combined.tsv so Routines 3/5 don't need
# to look it up separately. Update here when book status changes.
# FIRST TOUR: Y = artist has not yet toured DC/MD/VA region at all (festivals, cruises,
# and award shows don't count). Blank = has played the region, just haven't caught them.
# Tour URL: artist's own tour page preferred; use BIT URL if no dedicated page.
Artist
